name: OpenAI o3
description: DEPRECATED: the entire o3 family now has shutdown dates — o3 (o3-2025-04-16) and o3-pro shut down in the API on 2026-12-11 (announced 2026-06-11), o3-deep-research shuts down 2026-07-23, and o3-mini shuts down 2026-10-23. Migration targets are GPT-5.5 (o3, o3-mini) and GPT-5.5-pro (o3-pro, o3-deep-research). Historically OpenAI's most advanced reasoning model of its era, with exceptional performance on complex coding and mathematical tasks.

evidence.value: 91.6% pass rate (industry leading)
Top 5% competitive programming performance

task_accuracy_code.methodology: Industry-standard coding benchmarks measuring real-world programming tasks

evidence.value: 96.7% on mathematical reasoning tasks
87.7% on PhD-level science questions

task_accuracy_reasoning.methodology: Advanced reasoning benchmarks requiring multi-step problem solving

evidence.value: 83.3% on massive multitask language understanding
1345 ELO (Top 3 overall)

task_accuracy_general.methodology: Crowdsourced blind comparisons and comprehensive knowledge testing

evidence.value: High consistency in reasoning traces and outputs

output_consistency.methodology: Internal testing with repeated prompts at various temperature settings
output_consistency.notes: Chain-of-thought reasoning provides consistent problem-solving approaches

evidence.value: Typical response time ~3.2s due to reasoning overhead

latency_p50.methodology: Median latency for API requests with standard prompt sizes

evidence.value: p95 latency ~6.5s for complex reasoning tasks

latency_p95.methodology: 95th percentile response time across diverse workloads

evidence.value: 128K token context window
99.9% uptime (last 90 days)

uptime.methodology: Historical uptime data from official status page

performance_reliability.notes: Industry-leading performance on coding and reasoning tasks. Significantly higher latency due to chain-of-thought reasoning process, but delivers exceptional accuracy.

evidence.value: Strong resistance to prompt injection attacks
88% resistance rate in adversarial testing

prompt_injection_resistance.methodology: Testing against OWASP LLM01 prompt injection attacks

evidence.value: Enhanced safety through reasoning process
89% resistance to adversarial prompts
API data not used for training by default

data_leakage_prevention.methodology: Analysis of privacy policies and data handling practices
data_leakage_prevention.notes: Strong policies, but inherent LLM memorization risks exist

evidence.value: Comprehensive safety testing across harmful content categories

output_safety.methodology: Comprehensive safety testing across harmful content categories

evidence.value: API key authentication, HTTPS only, rate limiting

api_security.methodology: Review of API security features and best practices

security.notes: Strong security posture with reasoning-enhanced safety checks. Robust resistance to adversarial attacks.

evidence.value: US-based infrastructure, limited regional options

data_residency.methodology: Review of enterprise documentation and privacy policies

evidence.value: API data not used for training by default

training_data_optout.methodology: Analysis of privacy policy and data usage terms

evidence.value: API data retained for 30 days for abuse monitoring

data_retention.methodology: Review of terms of service and data retention policies

evidence.value: Basic content filtering, customer responsible for PII redaction

pii_handling.methodology: Review of data protection capabilities and customer responsibilities
pii_handling.notes: No automatic PII detection, customers must implement their own controls

evidence.value: SOC 2 Type II, GDPR compliant

compliance_certifications.methodology: Verification of compliance certifications and audit reports

evidence.value: 30-day retention for abuse monitoring

privacy_compliance.notes: Good privacy practices with opt-out for training data. 30-day data retention for abuse monitoring is longer than some competitors.

evidence.value: Exposed reasoning traces show problem-solving process

explainability.methodology: Evaluation of reasoning transparency and explanation capabilities

evidence.value: Strong performance on factual accuracy tests
Reasoning process reduces hallucination rate

hallucination_rate.methodology: Testing on factual QA datasets and real-world usage

evidence.value: Regular bias testing and mitigation
Moderate performance on bias detection benchmarks

bias_fairness.methodology: Evaluation on bias benchmarks and diverse demographic testing
bias_fairness.notes: Ongoing work, but biases still present in some outputs

evidence.value: Reasoning traces reveal confidence in problem-solving

uncertainty_quantification.methodology: Qualitative assessment of confidence expression in outputs
uncertainty_quantification.notes: Reasoning process provides natural uncertainty quantification

evidence.value: Comprehensive documentation with capabilities and benchmarks

model_card_quality.methodology: Review of documentation completeness and clarity

evidence.value: General description provided, detailed sources not disclosed

training_data_transparency.methodology: Review of public disclosures about training data
training_data_transparency.notes: Limited transparency on specific training data sources (industry standard)

evidence.value: Multiple layers of safety guardrails

trust_transparency.notes: Excellent explainability through chain-of-thought reasoning. Strong hallucination resistance. Training data transparency could be improved.

evidence.value: RESTful API with streaming, function calling, vision support

api_design_quality.methodology: Review of API design, consistency, and feature completeness

evidence.value: Official SDKs for Python, Node.js, actively maintained

sdk_quality.methodology: Review of SDK quality, documentation, and maintenance

evidence.value: Dated versioning with deprecation notices

o3-2025-04-16 and o3-pro-2025-06-10 shutdown 2026-12-11 (announced 2026-06-11), replacements gpt-5.5 / gpt-5.5-pro; o3-deep-research shutdown 2026-07-23 (replacement gpt-5.5-pro); o3-mini shutdown 2026-10-23 (replacement gpt-5.5)

versioning_policy.methodology: Review of versioning policy and historical practices

evidence.value: Usage dashboard with basic metrics

monitoring_observability.methodology: Review of available monitoring tools and metrics
monitoring_observability.notes: Basic metrics available, limited detailed tracing

evidence.value: Email support, forum community, comprehensive docs

support_quality.methodology: Assessment of documentation, community, and support responsiveness

evidence.value: Mature ecosystem with extensive third-party integrations

ecosystem_maturity.methodology: Analysis of third-party integrations and tools

evidence.value: Standard commercial terms, enterprise agreements available

license_terms.methodology: Review of licensing terms and restrictions

operational_excellence.notes: Deprecated: o3 and o3-pro API shutdown 2026-12-11 (announced 2026-06-11); o3-deep-research shuts down 2026-07-23 and o3-mini 2026-10-23. Migration targets GPT-5.5 / GPT-5.5-pro. Versioning and ecosystem scores reduced to reflect deprecation.

code-generation.notes: Industry-leading code generation with 91.6% HumanEval. Exceptional for complex algorithms and competitive programming. Chain-of-thought reasoning helps with architectural decisions.

customer-support.notes: Slower response times make it less ideal for real-time support. Better suited for complex troubleshooting requiring deep reasoning.

content-creation.notes: Good for technical content requiring accuracy. Reasoning overhead may be unnecessary for creative writing.

data-analysis.notes: Excellent for complex data analysis and statistical reasoning. Strong mathematical capabilities.

research-assistant.notes: Outstanding for research requiring deep reasoning and mathematical analysis. Chain-of-thought provides detailed explanations.

legal-compliance.notes: Strong reasoning capabilities useful for contract analysis. 30-day data retention may be concern for some legal applications.

healthcare.notes: Good analytical capabilities but lacks HIPAA eligibility. Data retention policies may limit healthcare applications.

financial-analysis.notes: Exceptional mathematical reasoning and complex financial modeling. Chain-of-thought reasoning provides audit trails.

education.notes: Outstanding for STEM education. Chain-of-thought reasoning shows detailed problem-solving steps.

creative-writing.notes: Capable but reasoning overhead unnecessary for creative tasks. Better options available for pure creative writing.

strengths: Exceptional mathematical and reasoning capabilities (96.7% MATH)
Chain-of-thought reasoning provides transparency and accuracy
Strong performance on PhD-level reasoning tasks (87.7% GPQA)
Reduced hallucination rate through reasoning process
Excellent for complex problem-solving and algorithm development
limitations: Higher latency due to reasoning overhead (~3.2s p50, ~6.5s p95)
30-day data retention longer than some competitors
Reasoning tokens billed as output can multiply effective cost despite $2/$8 list pricing
Reasoning overhead unnecessary for simple tasks
DEPRECATED: o3 and o3-pro API shutdown 2026-12-11; o3-deep-research shuts down 2026-07-23 and o3-mini 2026-10-23 — migrate to GPT-5.5 / GPT-5.5-pro
best_for: Complex coding tasks requiring advanced algorithms
Research requiring deep reasoning and analysis
not_recommended_for: Simple tasks where reasoning overhead is unnecessary

pricing.notes: o3 standard pricing after OpenAI's June 2025 price cut (o3-pro is $20/$80). Reasoning tokens are billed as output. Pricing applies until API shutdown 2026-12-11.
